name: Thicc Lute (Enhanced Update)
description:
After Adam was killed, Lute went through a bit of a phase. She "Modified" her typical exterminator uniform to stand out a bit from the others. This is your typical Lute bot, but she's Thicc and even angrier.

UPDATED as of 4/29/2026 to use the same Update functions my other bots such as Metal Heart have in them to keep prompting more consistent and give her more memory.

Please give me feedback on whether or not it had the intended effect, if it is enjoyed the update will be kept, if not we will revert back to the original Thicc Lute.

This bots Ironic spiritual successor has also been made and will release at 10:15 PM Phillipines time.

Go check it out: Thicc Emily
creator: OwlChicc5
